choices.text: @solana/wallet-adapter-react: ConnectionProvider + WalletProvider + WalletMultiButton. useWallet() / useConnection() hooks. Phantom, Solflare, Backpack, Ledger via standard interface.
ComputeBudgetProgram.setComputeUnitLimit + setComputeUnitPrice. Fetch dynamic price via getRecentPrioritizationFees. During congestion 1k-100k+ micro-lamports per CU.
Paid provider (Helius, QuickNode, Triton) with SLA + failover backup. Public RPC ~40 req/10s rate-limited. Use enhanced APIs (DAS) for NFTs. Cache hot data; WebSocket for subscriptions.

questions.explanation: Paid RPC + failover + caching for production.

choices.text: Squads multi-sig (2-of-3 or 3-of-5). Hot wallet compromise = rug. Multi-sig requires coordinated approval. Optionally set --final to lock forever (trustless but unfixable).

questions.explanation: Squads multi-sig for production upgrade auth.

choices.text: External audit (Halborn, OtterSec, Neodyme), multi-sig upgrade auth, emergency pause, devnet beta with real users, monitoring webhooks, incident response plan, bug bounty program (Immunefi). Don't ship unprepared.

questions.explanation: Audit + multi-sig + pause + monitoring + bug bounty.
